title: Goofy Ahh PvP Sounds
description: Makes PvP a lot more interesting and funny by changing the sounds of PvP related items!
body:
**This pack makes PvP a lot more fun, silly, and interesting by changing PvP related sounds into the goofiest sounds I could find!**


**List of sounds changed:**
- Wind Charge
- Mace Smash Attack
- Knockback Hit
- TNT Fuse sound
- Shield Block Sound
- Burp Sound After Eating
- Menu Click Sound
- Totem Pop Sound
- Armor/Shield Breaking Sound
